title: SENSARTE Nonstick Skillet, Deep Frying Pan 26 cm/4 Litre Saute Pan with Lid, Stay-Cool Handle, Healthy Stone Cookware Cooking Pan, Induction Compatible
features: Swiss Non-Stick Coating - Switzerland ILAG nonstick granite coating. Free of Intentionally Added PFOA, smokeless, safe & healthy. Cooking with little oil for healthy diet.

Suitable For All Stoves - High magnetic conductive stainless steel base allows the frying pan to work on all cooktops, including induction. The core of the crepe pan is die cast aluminum, which is durable and heats up quickly and evenly.

Vesatile Saute Pan with Pour Spout- Size: 28cm/10-in diameter, 2.7" tall, 3.3L capacity. Deep and large enough for saute, stirfry, boil, shallow fry & deep fry. The pour spout is super handy for soups and oils.

Glass Lid & Stay-cool Handle - Durable tempered glass lid makes it comvenient to see the cooking status and limits splashes on your stove. Woodgrain bakelite handle is comfortable to grip and stays cool while cooking. Oven safe to 150℃.

Easy To Clean - The non-stick chef pan designed without rivets, which will not cover up the dirt, and it is super easy to clean. SENSARTE non-stick frying pan is passed international certification. Please always feel free to contact us if you have any questions.
description: Product Description Why Buy SENSARTE Nonstick Saute Pans？ Versatile Cookware - Everything from saute, steam, boil, shallow fry & deep fry. This large 3.3L / 4L Saute Pan is big enough to hold a family meal; This deep skillet interior & exterior is coated by high performance non-stick granite coating, which makes the saute pan easy to cook and clean; Cast aluminum core assures fast and even heating which can speed up cooking time; Deep cooking surface makes it very versatile and help to keep a lot in the pan. Can be used for saute, steam, boil, shallow fry & deep fry, and minimize spills and splatters; Convenient spout helps pour sauces and other liquids easily; All-in-one design, no rivets, avoids rust and easy to clean. Just wipe it with a paper towel or rinse it with water, which make cooking not only easier but also more enjoyable. No need to season the pot before or after using. Magnetic Conductive Bottom Flat and thick bottom (5mm) Stainless steel induction base Fast cooking and heat evenly Suitable for all stove ERGONOMIC BAKELITE HANDLE The handle is made of bakelite, so it's comfortable to hold and stays cooling while cooking, reduces heat burn opportunities. Vented Tempered Glass Lid Tempered glass lid is durable and has a high transparency, which makes it easy to see what you are doing, and limits splashes on your stove. The rim of lid that would seal in the steam and flavor, bring you a tasty meal. USE & CARE Stay away from metal utensil in cooking as well as steel wools in cleaning. After cooking on it, leave it on the stove to cool down on it's own. Use High Heat Plastic or Wood utensils. Clean with soap, water, soft sponge and wipe with thin film of Oil. Designed for all stovetops, including induction stovetop. Low to medium heat is recommended. Oven safe to 302℉. Recommend hand washing for longer term use. Suitable for dishwasher at low temperature. The Instruction is on the back of the card.
